PAGE | 2

Problem
33 million small businesses in the US all have one
thing in common – they need working capital
every day to operate and grow, but 4 out of 5
small businesses can’t get approved for a bank
loan, and banks are slow.
PAGE | 3

Solution
Bizfundingfinder is an online marketplace that
matches small business owners with suitable
funding programs, helping businesses access
up to $2 million in less than 24 hours,
regardless of personal credit or collateral.
PAGE | 4

How It Works
Fast and Easy Operating Cash
No Hidden Fees. No Credit Requirements.
No Specified Terms of Use.
Apply
Our online application is quick, easy and free.
How quick? Find out now.
Match
We'll match you with the best options in our
network in as little as 15 minutes.
Fund
Funds are deposited within 24 hours, getting you
back to business as usual in no time at all.
